name: pharma-pos-system
description: Pharmaceutical POS and Inventory Management System

scripts.mobile:start: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ips=(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -notlike '127.*' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.254.*' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty IPAddress -Unique); Write-Host 'Open on mobile (same Wi-Fi):'; $ips | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ('http://' + $_ + ':3000') }; $env:AUTO_OPEN='false'; node server.js"
scripts.desktop:start: cross-env AUTO_OPEN=false ELECTRON_MODE=true concurrently "node server.js" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.desktop:dev: cross-env AUTO_OPEN=false ELECTRON_MODE=true concurrently "node server.js" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
